response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience across diverse stacks (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, C/C++, Java) and demonstrates strong software craftsmanship through TDD advocacy, workshops, and open-source contributions. However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, A/B testing frameworks, or telemetry/measurement infrastructure — the core focus of this Principal/IC6 role. Title is Senior/Staff rather than Principal, and there's limited evidence of multi-team platform leadership at enterprise scale.
strengths: Broad polyglot experience including C/C++, Java, JavaScript/TypeScript, Python-adjacent ecosystems
High-scale low-latency systems work at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic (millions of HTTP requests/sec)
Strong engineering fundamentals: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and active mentorship via workshops
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing, feature flighting, or rollout automation
Limited evidence of Principal/IC6-level multi-workstream leadership across teams and products
No explicit data science, statistical analysis, or metrics/guardrails platform experience

key_factors.factor: Strong engineering fundamentals and polyglot breadth
Seniority gap relative to Principal/IC6 scope
